LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT AND SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING UNDER C.C.P. 526A REGARDING THE ALLEGED "WASTE" OF PUBLIC FUNDS. (AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER THAT WAS EMAILED TO THE COURT.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Continued To May-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT and SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff lacks standing under C.C.P. 526a regarding the alleged "waste" of public funds. (After hearing, the Court signed the proposed order that was emailed to the court.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
